briefs.title: BC Gaming Control Regulation Overhauled — New Rules Take Effect April 2026
briefs.summary: BC has replaced its old gaming rules with a new Gaming Control Regulation, effective April 13, 2026. It sets updated definitions and requirements for gaming businesses, including electronic gaming devices, online gaming, horse racing licences, and live dealer studios.
briefs.action_required: Review the new Gaming Control Regulation before April 13, 2026 to ensure your gaming business is compliant.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Control Regulation takes effect
